sourceMovie.title: Just Mercy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Just Mercy works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: No Man of God
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Just Mercy clicked for you, No Man of God (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Just Mercy?
faq.answer: Try No Man of God, Primal Fear, The Trial of the Chicago 7—each shares DNA with Just Mercy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Just Mercy?
faq.answer: Just Mercy (2019) is best described as Drama, Crime, History. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Just Mercy worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
